keywordspec.name: lge.auto.Android
keywordspec.doc:
The `Android` class can control android device via adb server. - refer : https://github.com/Swind/pure-python-adb
This class connect adb server and then this class control android device by serial name each other. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Swind/pure-python-adb/master/docs/adb_pure_python_adb.png
And you can download the Android SDK https://developer.android.com/studio/releases/platform-tools page.

kw.name: Adb Devices
kw.doc:
run adb devices
return: adb device list. type is list.
Examples: | @{adb devicr list}= | Adb Devices |

kw.name: Connect Adb Server
kw.doc:
Connect adb server. this command function result is same result of `adb start-server` command. And the first adb device was setted defaultly 'adb -s' option
argument: - ``host`` : adb server ip. default value is 127.0.0.1 - ``port`` : adb server port. default value is 5037
Examples: | `Connect Adb Server` | | `Connect Adb Server` | 127.0.0.1 | 5037 |
kw.shortdoc: Connect adb server. this command function result is same result of `adb start-server` command. And the first adb device was setted defaultly 'adb -s' option

kw.name: Incoming Call
kw.doc:
run `adb input keyevent 5` and `adb input text`
argument: - ``number`` : phone number - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run screen capture. else select the device named ``serial`` then run screen capture. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Incoming Call` | 01012345678 | | `Incoming Call` | 01012345678 | serial=R3CR600XL3D |
kw.shortdoc: run `adb input keyevent 5` and `adb input text`

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc:
run `adb input text`
argument: - ``text`` : string - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run screen capture. else select the device named ``serial`` then run screen capture. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Incoming Call` | hello | | `Incoming Call` | hello | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Install
kw.doc:
run `adb install` ``apk_path``
argument: - ``apk_path`` : path of apk file - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then install apk. else select the device named ``serial`` then install apk. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Install` | test.apk | | `Install` | test.apk | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: KeyEvent
kw.doc:
run `adb input keyevent` ``keycode``
argument: - ``keycode`` : code of keyevent. reference : https://developer.android.com/reference/android/view/KeyEvent#constants_1 - ``long_press`` : if you want to make long press, set True. default value is False. - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run keyevent. else select the device named ``serial`` then run keyevent. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `KeyEvent` | 3 | | `KeyEvent` | 3 | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Pull
kw.doc:
run `adb pull` ``src`` ``dest``
argument: - ``src`` : path of src file - ``dest`` : path of PC - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run adb pull. else select the device named ``serial`` then run adb pull. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Pull` | /sdcard/test.jpg | D:\test\test.jpg | | `Pull` | /sdcard/test.jpg | D:\test\test.jpg | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Push
kw.doc:
run `adb push` ``src`` ``dest``
argument: - ``src`` : path of src file - ``dest`` : path of android device - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run adb push. else select the device named ``serial`` then run adb push. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Push` | D:\test\test.jpg | /sdcard/test.jpg | | `Push` | D:\test\test.jpg | /sdcard/test.jpg | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Reboot
kw.doc:
run `adb reboot`
argument: - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run adb reboot. else select the device named ``serial`` then run adb reboot. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `reboot` | | `reboot` | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: ScreenCap
kw.doc:
run `adb screencap` and save image file on PC
argument: - ``img_path`` : PC`s path of captured img - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run screen capture. else select the device named ``serial`` then run screen capture. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `ScreenCap` | D:\test\test.jpg | | `ScreenCap` | D:\test\test.jpg | serial=R3CR600XL3D |
kw.shortdoc: run `adb screencap` and save image file on PC

kw.name: Select Device
kw.doc:
changed 'adb -s' device
argument: - ``serial`` : adb device serial name
Examples: | `Select Device` | R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Shell
kw.doc:
run `adb shell` ``cmd``
argument: - ``cmd`` : adb shell command - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then run adb shell ``cmd``. else select the device named ``serial`` then run adb shell ``cmd``. it's same '-s' option in adb
return: result of adb shell ``cmd`` stdout
Examples: | ${result}= | `Shell` | ls -al | | ${result}= | `Shell` | ls -al | R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Start Logcat
kw.doc:
start logcat
argument: - ``logpath`` : path of logcat log file - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then save logcat. else select the device named ``serial`` then save logcat. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Start Logcat` | adb.log | | `Start Logcat` | adb.log | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Swipe

arguments.repr: x1, y1, x2, y2, duration=300, serial=None

kw.doc:
run `adb input Swipe` ``x1`` ``y1`` ``x2`` ``y2`` ``duration``
argument: - ``x1`` : the x coordinate of the start point - ``y1`` : the y coordinate of the start point - ``x2`` : the x coordinate of the end point - ``y2`` : the y coordinate of the end point - ``duration`` : duration of swipe (ms). default value is 300ms - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then make swipe. else select the device named ``serial`` then make swipe. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Swipe` | 900 | 1000 | 800 | 200 | | `Swipe` | 900 | 1000 | 800 | 200 | serial=R3CR600XL3D | | `Swipe` | 900 | 1000 | 900 | 1000 | duration=5000 | serial=R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Touch
kw.doc:
run `adb input tap` ``x`` ``y``
argument: - ``x`` : x coordinate of touch - ``y`` : y coordinate of touch - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then make touch. else select the device named ``serial`` then make touch. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Touch` | 900 | 1000 | | `Touch` | 900 | 1000 | R3CR600XL3D |

kw.name: Uninstall
kw.doc:
run `adb uninstall` ``apk_package``
argument: - ``apk_package`` : name of pakcage - ``serial`` : if serial is None, select the first device in the adb device list then uninstall package. else select the device named ``serial`` then uninstall package. it's same '-s' option in adb
Examples: | `Uninstall` | package.test | | `Uninstall` | package.test | serial=R3CR600XL3D |
